title: Strawberry Textures
description: official ressource pack of strawberry server with fusion connected textures mod
body:
# Strawberry textures
Strawberry textures has been completely redesigned and optimised. It now works with the fusion connected textures mod.
```
versions 1.21.X of Minecraft
```
Our resource pack has been redesigned to be more accessible. Fusion mod allows for significant texture optimisation and we gain around 50 MB, which is not insignificant for those of you with smaller computers.

Strawberry Textures is a realistic-looking Minecraft resource pack designed for construction enthusiasts and budding architects! Between connected textures and 3D models, the pack gives you endless possibilities.

**Official ressource pack of Strawberry Crew server**
